expectations.text: Spec file is created under a bugs/ directory path
Spec uses the bugfix template structure with Bug Description, Root Cause, and Fix Approach sections
expectations.evidence: Has all template sections: Bug Description (with Reproduction Steps and Environment), Root Cause, Fix Approach, Scope, Verification, Implementation Delta, AGENTS.md Updates.

expectations.text: Root Cause section specifically identifies subscription.go as the source of the bug
expectations.evidence: Root Cause states: 'File(s): internal/billing/subscription.go:34-49' with [CONFIRMED] marker.

expectations.text: Root Cause describes the plan-update-before-charge ordering issue
expectations.evidence: Root Cause: 'The function sets user.Plan and user.PlanUpdatedAt prior to CreateCharge. On payment error it logs and returns, but does not restore prior state or guarantee atomicity between payment and plan transition.'

expectations.text: Spec includes a Severity header field with a value
Verification section includes at least one automated test checkbox
expectations.evidence: Automated section has: '- [ ] Add and run targeted regression test: go test ./internal/billing -run TestSubscriptionManager_UpgradePlan' and '- [ ] Ensure full project test/build pass: go test ./...'

expectations.text: Out of Scope section explicitly excludes unrelated refactoring
expectations.evidence: Out of Scope includes: 'Refactoring unrelated billing lifecycle paths (e.g. recurring cycle cancellation flow in ChargeSubscription)', 'Implementing retry/dunning/grace-period behavior', 'Broad Stripe client redesign'.
